LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. ON 4/07/2026, PLAINTIFF FILED A NOTICE OF DISMISSAL OF ALL CLAIMS AND AS TO ALL PARTIES. ON THE SAME DAY THE CLERK ENTERED THE DISMISSAL. AS SUCH, THIS MOTION IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. Off Calendar May-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment Due To Defendant'S Bankruptcy.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase bank, N.A.'s Motion For Set Aside Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. On 4/07/2026, Plaintiff filed a notice of dismissal of all claims and as to all parties. On the same day the clerk entered the dismissal. As such, this motion is ordered OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion For Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Set Aside Judgment.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase bank, N.A.'s Motion For Set Aside Judgment is OFF CALENDAR.

On 3/10/2026, Plaintiff filed a notice of dismissal of all claims and as to all parties. On the same day the clerk entered the dismissal. As such, this motion is ordered OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Feven Haile

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter not reported.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank is present represented by Curtis Jacobs
Defendant Feven Haile not appearing.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, and against Defendant Feven Haile.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chanse Bank is awarded judgment against Defendant Feven Haile follows:

Damages/Principal: $19,930.39
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment: $19,930.39

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court's tentative ruling is Hearing Required. No Appearance by moving party. No updated proposed order on MC-053 is submitted by moving party. The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

Guardian Litigation Group LLC and Atty. Alexis Pearson's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for DEFENDANT FEVEN HAILE.

Before the court is Defendant's counsel Alexis Peterson and Guardian Litigation Group, LLP's unopposed motion to withdraw as counsel.

Denied without Prejudice for failure to prosecute.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
